completedActions.name: Create standalone bit manipulation test (test/uuid64-redesign.test.ts) to verify: byte 15 format (rr011110), 12-bit sequence in bytes 6-7, full 8 bits in byte 8, validation logic
Update buildTimestampAndSequence() to write full 16-bit sequence to bytes 6-7 (remove version nibble)
Update random generation to write full 8 bits to byte 8 (remove variant bits) and set byte 15 to (random[14] & 0x03) | 0x7C
Update constructor validation to check (buffer[15] & 0xFC) === 0x7C instead of checking bytes 6 and 8
Update validate() function to use new validation rules for byte 15
Update existing tests (test/identifiable.ts) to verify monotonicity and validation still work
Run all tests to verify no regressions

name: Redesign UUID64 to remove version/variant bits
summary: Move version/variant bits (version 0x7 + variant 0b10) to the end of the 16-byte uuid buffer before base64 encoding. This will allow us to concentrate the timestamp/sequence bits in the first 60 bits of the uuid
